title: Add activity_service unit tests
description: Add unit tests for ActivityService.create_activity, get_activity, list_activities, and search_activities in tests/unit/test_activity_service.py. Test create_activity returns ApiResponse with non-None id, get_activity retrieves a created activity, list_activities returns paginated results, and search_activities filters by keyword correctly.
acceptance: pytest tests/unit/test_activity_service.py --collect-only shows >=5 test items; pytest tests/unit/test_activity_service.py -v passes all; assert result.data['id'] is not None for create_activity; assert isinstance(result.data['items'], list) for list_activities
